examples: The growing power of the elite, who controlled the economy, would give them the means to physically coerce people to move to Teotihuacán and serve as additions to the labor force.
What it does not have is a right to coerce.
You cannot coerce someone into learning.
The ultimate power of the president is the power to persuade, not to coerce.
The tests are intended to coerce firms into encouraging lower-paid employees to save more.
